one_line_summary: Session aborted on stream timeout after only index.md was written; the three required artefacts (ARCHITECTURE, TUTORIAL, API) are entirely missing.
strengths: Stayed within docs-new/ and did not commit or push
index.md prose is competent and previews real concepts (UntrustedStr, Engine, ports/adapters)
weaknesses: ARCHITECTURE.md, TUTORIAL.md, and API.md were never created
Session log shows a stream idle timeout — task terminated before substantive work
Index links point to nonexistent files, so navigation is broken
Consistency harness coverage only 6/90 (6.7%) — effectively nothing to validate
No evidence in the log of source reading
